visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-definition close-up of a braised pork trotter, showcasing its glossy, deep brown skin and tender interior, held up by wooden chopsticks. In the blurred background, several more trotters are simmering in a thick, mahogany-colored sauce within a modern light-pink cooking pot. (2) A new phase shows the kitchen setup: an empty ceramic pot filled with clear water sits on a clean white glass-top stove. Tiny bubbles are visible at the base of the pot as the heat begins to rise, indicating the start of the cooking process. (3) The scene shifts to the blanching stage where a pair of hands with polished white nails carefully places chunks of raw, pale-pink pork trotters into the now-simmering water. The skin of the trotters appears clean and firm, and the water starts to foam slightly upon contact. (4) After boiling, the hands use a white slotted ladle to remove the trotters, which have now turned an opaque greyish-white. They are moved to a yellow plastic colander under a sleek black faucet where cool water runs over them, removing impurities as the hands toss them gently. (5) The preparation continues on a dark, textured cutting board where a sharp knife is used to slice fresh ginger and chop long green scallions into three-inch segments. The lighting highlights the fresh moisture on the vegetables and the precision of the slicing motion. (6) The trotters are placed back in the clean pot. A glass bottle of Coca-Cola is uncapped and poured in, the dark liquid bubbling and fizzing as it covers the meat. This is followed by a plate of water, dark soy sauce from a bottle, and a sprinkle of white seasoning powder. (7) The final cooking phase starts as the chopped ginger and scallions are layered on top of the trotters. A glass lid with a red handle is placed over the pot, and the scene transitions to the pot boiling vigorously, with the sauce reducing into a rich, savory glaze that coats the meat perfectly.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 可樂豬腳. (2) [Subtitle]: 煮水. (3) [Subtitle]: 下豬腳. (4) [Subtitle]: 川燙. (5) [Subtitle]: 撈起. (6) [Subtitle]: 清洗. (7) [Subtitle]: 切料蔥薑. (8) [Subtitle]: 一瓶可樂. (9) [Subtitle]: 加水 (酌過豬腳). (10) [Subtitle]: 適量醬油. (11) [Subtitle]: 適量胡椒. (12) [Subtitle]: 蔥薑下鍋. (13) [Subtitle]: 煮熟即可.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator visible only as hands
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is only visible through their hands, which feature white nail polish and handle the cooking tools.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, bright indoor kitchen featuring a white stovetop, a black faucet, and a clean white countertop. The cooking utensils are stylish, including a light pink pot with a red handle on the lid.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a light, upbeat acoustic pop song featuring a female vocalist singing in English. The background is filled with the soft ambient hum of a kitchen. (2) A sharp mechanical click and a whoosh of gas ignition are heard as the stove is turned on, followed by the distant sound of water beginning to simmer. (3) Distinct splashing and thudding sounds occur as raw pieces of meat are dropped into the pot of water. The tempo of the BGM remains steady and pleasant. (4) A consistent, rushing sound of a water tap fills the audio as the meat is rinsed, accompanied by the clatter of the strainer against the sink. (5) Rhythmic, crisp chopping sounds follow as ginger and scallions are sliced on a board, showing a clear percussive texture against the music. (6) A satisfying "pop" followed by a fizzy hiss marks the opening of a carbonated beverage bottle, which is then followed by a long, glugging pouring sound. (7) More pouring sounds of different liquid textures (water, then thicker soy sauce) are heard, ending with the metallic clink and slide of a shaker for spices. (8) A resonant clink of glass hitting the pot rim occurs as the lid is placed on. The audio finishes with the dense, rhythmic bubbling and simmering sound of the sauce.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Blanching -> Rinsing -> Prepping Aromatics -> Braising -> Final Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a concise and visually appetizing step-by-step tutorial for cooking Cola Pork Trotters, showcasing the simple preparation process and the final succulent dish.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Coca-Cola and a soy sauce brand are visible, they appear as necessary ingredients for the recipe rather than a paid promotional highlight.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A clean, high-quality cooking tutorial with effective foley sounds (chopping, pouring) that complement the upbeat background music.
